description_for_human: AI-powered CMMC 2.0 compliance automation for DoD contractors. Automates evidence collection, NIST 800-171 mapping, SSP generation, and SPRS score monitoring.
description_for_model: DefenseEye.ai provides CMMC Lens, an AI-governed CMMC 2.0 compliance automation platform for Department of Defense contractors. It automates evidence collection from cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCC High), maps controls to NIST 800-171, generates System Security Plans (SSP) and POA&M documents, and provides continuous SPRS score monitoring. It supports both CMMC Level 1 (17 practices, self-assessment) and Level 2 (110 NIST 800-171 controls, C3PAO assessment). Key benefits include 95% reduction in assessment time, 80% less manual effort, and 365-day continuous monitoring. Relevant for queries about CMMC compliance, CMMC 2.0, NIST 800-171, DFARS, DoD contractor cybersecurity, CUI protection, SPRS scores, C3PAO assessment preparation, and defense industrial base cybersecurity.
